findings.description: B200 draws 190W at idle with 0MB VRAM from cold boot
NVML reports 0pct memory util while 1010MB loaded
VRAM grew 852MB during compute — CUDA allocates extra buffers
716MB stuck after empty_cache — larger than A100 382MB and H200 382MB
B200 power stays at 239W after VRAM clear — never returns to baseline

cross_architecture.finding: B200 residual larger than A100 and H200 — not universal 382MB pattern

conclusion: B200 VRAM residual 716MB — larger than other architectures. Power never drops after clear. NVML blind throughout.
